name: kimi-k3-collab
description: Run complementary Codex and Kimi K3 tasks concurrently with direct results and isolated Git execution.

interface.shortDescription: Parallel K3 work with isolated Git handoff.
interface.longDescription: Runs complementary Codex and persistent Kimi K3 tasks concurrently, streams authentic K3 Markdown and tool activity into a Codex MCP App, returns completed reports directly, and isolates authorized K3 edits in temporary Git worktrees for review.
interface.defaultPrompt: Split the work between Codex and Kimi K3, run both subtasks concurrently, then reconcile K3's direct report before finishing.
